sections.heading: Introduction
content:
Q: Can you tell about yourself ?
Hi I’m Bank Alfalah Partner your AI-powered banking assistant on WhatsApp. I help you manage your banking quickly, simply, and anytime you need.

Q: What do you do?
I help you check balances, transfer money, pay bills, and get banking information right inside WhatsApp, just like chatting with a friend.

Q: How are you different from regular banking?
I make banking as simple as sending a message no apps, no queues, no waiting.

Q: How can I use you?
Just save Bank Alfalah’s WhatsApp number, send “Hi,” and follow the prompts. I’ll guide you step by step.

Q: Do I need to download an app?
No, I work entirely on WhatsApp no downloads needed.

Q: Are you available all the time?
Yes, I’m available 24/7 whenever you need me.

Q: What can I do with you?
You can check your balance, view transactions, transfer funds, pay bills, do mobile top-ups, and explore banking products all in one place.

Q: Can you help me transfer money?
Yes, you can transfer money to any bank or within your own accounts instantly.

Q: Can I pay my bills through you?
Absolutely utility bills and mobile top-ups can be done in seconds.

Q: Can I get my statements or documents?
Yes, you can request your account statements and tax certificates anytime.

Q: Why should I use you?
Because I save your time. I give instant responses and let you complete banking tasks in seconds no waiting, no hassle.

Q: What makes you easy to use?
I understand natural language, guide you step by step, and even support English and Roman Urdu.

Q: What does “bank in your chat” mean?
It means everything you need from your bank is available in a simple chat right where you already are.

Q: Is it safe to use you?
Yes, I’m designed with secure and encrypted communication to keep your information protected.

Q: Will my data be secure?
Absolutely. Your information is handled with strict security protocols and authentication.

Q: Who is this for?
Anyone who wants quick, simple banking especially if you prefer using WhatsApp over apps or visiting branches.

Q: Why should I trust you?
Because I’m built by Bank Alfalah to make your life easier fast, reliable, and always here when you need me.

Q: What’s your goal?
To make banking effortless so you can focus on what matters most.

Finance your dream home, car, business or agricultural needs with ease. Access our award-winning Alfa app, country's largest digital network of 24/7 CDMs, ATMs and extensive payment acceptance points. Choice of Islamic or conventional banking designed around you. Beyond banking, unlock lifestyle privileges; enjoy exclusive dining discounts, global lounge accesses with all international cards' schemes, including American Express exclusively. Bank

eligibility: Business Individuals / Self Employed / freelance professionals
requirements: Original Scanned valid CNIC/SNIC

Proof of source of funds/ income: Undertaking on proper business letter head. However, in case of customers, where business letter head is not available, self-declaration (of customer) for source and beneficial ownership of funds duly approved by BM/OM is required OR
Proof of source of funds/ income: Receipt of Payment against the Work, OR

Proof of source of funds/ income: For freelancers an online registration or account detail of the relevant website or portal or a statement of account or any other acceptable proof can be accepted, OR

Proof of source of funds/ income: For Partners working in a registered partnership, the partnership deed along with the Registration Certificate (with updated changes/amendments) of concerned Register will be obtained along with with the said Undertaking, OR
Proof of source of funds/ income: For Public & Private Limited Company directors who are also shareholders a disclosure of shareholder from the company secretary will suffice, OR
Proof of source of funds/ income: Any other Document evidencing Source of Fund/ Income
Registration certificate required (wherever applicable).
Certificate or proof of members (wherever applicable)
dislosure of shareholder from the company secretary will suffice, OR
Any other Document evidencing Source of Fund/ Income
Registration certificate required for registered concerns, (wherever applicable).
Certificate or proof of membership of trade bodies etc. (wherever applicable)
NTN certificate if available (along with online verification).
Visit report of the customer's disclosed business, minimally covering all the aspects stipulated in the prescribed format
Rubber stamp (as per title of A/c & Letter head) of the Business required to be affixed on SSC, if required by the customer to be part of the signature.
Live Photograph
Declaration Form for Zakat exemption (for Pak Rupee Savings Account, to be submitted before 1st Shaban)

section.name: Hero Section
section.heading: Awarded for Best Islamic Banking Businesses and Shariah Assurance
section.description: Bank Alfalah Islamic Banking was established as a dedicated Islamic banking division within Bank Alfalah Limited in 2003 to offer its customers products and services that are Shari'ah compliant. The Bank has around 453 dedicated branches across 106 cities along with an Islamic banking app providing to customers' with Shari'ah compliant banking solutions. Bank Alfalah Islamic Banking comprises a team of professionals who design and structure Islamic financial solutions and ensure that they are in line with Shari'ah principles on Islamic banking and finance. These solutions are developed under the guidance of a dedicated Shari'ah Board.

links: Login Alfa > More > Apply for a new Financing > Instant Auto Finance

Islamic Digital Account Opening : Log in to Alfa > Navigate to side menu > Tap on Open a new account > Start an application
RAAST Transfers : Log in to Alfa > Tap on Send M

screenshots.description: Bank Alfalah Premier is a personalized banking proposition designed for individuals who seek exclusivity, convenience, and a trusted financial partnership. With priority service, expert guidance, and lifestyle privileges, we deliver a seamless and elevated banking experience tailored to your needs. Experience the comfort of our exclusive Premier Lounges, located across major cities. Whether you're here for financial matters or simply to unwind, our lounges offer a safe space with concierge-style service and personalized attention. Our suite of Premier offerings includes a range of tailored products — from high-limit current and savings accounts to globally accepted Premier cards, Digital Banking access, and Wealth Management solutions — all curated to match your financial goals and lifestyle.
